name: Morning Briefing
description: Wake up to a personalized daily summary covering your calendar, unread emails, local weather, and top news stories. Delivered to your preferred channel before you even pour your coffee.
author: ProwlrBot Team

before_after.before: Checking 4 different apps every morning, losing 20 minutes before the day even starts
before_after.after: One concise briefing waiting in your inbox or chat at 6:30 AM sharp

user_stories.quote: I used to open five apps before breakfast. Now I glance at one message and I know exactly what my day looks like.
user_stories.name: Rachel M.

user_stories.quote: The weather-plus-calendar combo saved me from biking to a client meeting in a thunderstorm. Twice.
user_stories.name: Derek S.

user_stories.quote: I forward the briefing to my team Slack every morning. Everyone starts the day on the same page.
user_stories.name: Priya K.

setup_steps.instruction: Connect your email account (Gmail or Outlook) through the integrations panel.
Link your calendar so the briefing can pull today's events.
Set your location for weather forecasts (city name or zip code).
Pick your news topics — business, tech, local, world, or custom keywords.
Choose delivery time and channel (email, Slack, Telegram, or Discord).
